entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0012 (34) awarded to GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION 0034 TO CONTRACT #ED-FSA-09-D-0012 IS TO REPLACE SECTION B.11 FSA 32-1 INVOICE PROCEDURES (AUGUST 2007) WITH FSA 32-1 INVOICE CLAUSE (MAR 2012).

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorUEIInformation.ns1:UEILegalBusinessName: GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC.

ns1:vendor.ns1:contractorName: GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC.

entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0012 (35) awarded to GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION 0035 TO CONTRACT #ED-FSA-09-D-0012 IS TO DISTRIBUTE ADDITIONAL 145 PERSONAL IDENTITY VERIFICATION (PIV) TOKENS TO THE CONTRACTOR. TOKENS ARE BEING ISSUED AS GOVERNMENT FURNISHED PROPERTY (GFP) IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0012 (36) awarded to GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC., was modified for the amount of $148,058

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION 0036 TO CONTRACT# ED-FSA-09-D-0012 IS TO PROVIDE FUNDING FOR SYSTEM CHANGES DUE TO THE LEGISLATIVE CHANGES, AS REFLECTED IN CR#1614 - TEMPORARY ELIMINATION OF INTEREST SUBSIDY DURING GRACE PERIOD.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorUEIInformation.ns1:UEILegalBusinessName: GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC.

ns1:vendor.ns1:contractorName: GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT
